assignment: Replace the marker-only DKR-0 proof with a complete replayable keep, reshape, or remove disposition matrix for every file changed by PR 346, while preserving separate judgement evidence for independent review.
required_checks: Generate the changed-file universe from git diff --name-status main...HEAD and pin the head.
Give every changed file exactly one top-level disposition plus one or more named rule ids, public concepts, evidence refs, and downstream owner DKRs.
For source files with multiple public concepts, include concept-level entries so one file-level label cannot hide mixed decisions.
Make the replay fail for a missing, duplicate, unknown, stale, or out-of-universe path, an absent rule id, an absent evidence ref, or an unassigned reshape/remove owner.
Separate mechanical coverage from judgement: mechanical coverage must replay; judgement must be explicitly pending independent inspection.
Fill every executable checkpoint identity field and every active wall entry with fresh numeric values, distinct evidence and verification refs, and an honest gate.
Do not mark the checkpoint accepted.
forbidden: Product code, tests, docs, manifests, git history, PR state, external services, frame, tree, or another worker's artifacts
Treating eager declared-tree activation, runtime tag provision, or runtime missing-tag failure as defects
Claiming that a mechanical matrix checker proves architectural judgement
terminal_condition: Finish when every current PR path and mixed public concept has a replayable disposition, all checkpoint fields are executable, and judgement remains explicitly pending a separate validator.
